cards.back: A waterborne disease caused by Vibrio cholerae, characterized by severe diarrhea and dehydration
A waterborne disease caused by Salmonella Typhi, characterized by fever, headache, and abdominal pain
A waterborne disease caused by Schistosoma parasites, characterized by intestinal or urinary symptoms
An inflammation of the stomach and intestines, often caused by contaminated water or food
A waterborne disease caused by Leptospira bacteria, characterized by fever, headache, and muscle aches
